Test Case Description: Valid request with existing place_id - verify all response fields
Expected Behavior: Response returns 200 with all fields (location.latitude and location.longitude and accuracy and name and phone_number and address and website and language) matching values used during place creation

Test Case Description: Valid request - verify address returns updated value after PUT update
Expected Behavior: address field returns the new updated address value instead of the original

Test Case Description: Valid request - place created with special characters in address
Expected Behavior: address field returns the special characters exactly as stored during creation

Test Case Description: Valid request - place created with HTTPS website
Expected Behavior: website field returns the HTTPS URL exactly as stored during creation

Test Case Description: Valid request - verify response Content-Type is application/json
Expected Behavior: Response header Content-Type is application/json

Test Case Description: Missing place_id query parameter (param not included in URL)
Expected Behavior: Error - place_id query parameter is required. URL format: /get/json?key=qaclick123

Test Case Description: Empty place_id query parameter (param present but blank)
Expected Behavior: Error - place_id cannot be empty. URL format: /get/json?place_id=&key=qaclick123

Test Case Description: Non-existent place_id
Expected Behavior: Response returns msg: "Get operation failed, looks like place_id  doesn't exists"

Test Case Description: Deleted place_id (place was created then deleted)
Expected Behavior: Response returns msg: "Get operation failed, looks like place_id  doesn't exists"

Test Case Description: Invalid API key
Expected Behavior: Error - forbidden due to invalid API key

Test Case Description: Missing API key
Expected Behavior: Error - forbidden due to missing API key

Test Case Description: Wrong HTTP method (POST instead of GET)
Expected Behavior: Error - method not allowed

Test Case Description: SQL injection attempt in place_id
Expected Behavior: No data returned - SQL injection does not execute. Returns not found error message

Test Case Description: Random numeric string for place_id
Expected Behavior: Response returns msg: "Get operation failed, looks like place_id  doesn't exists"

Test Case Description: Special characters only for place_id
Expected Behavior: Response returns msg: "Get operation failed, looks like place_id  doesn't exists"

Test Case Description: Very long string for place_id (256+ chars)
Expected Behavior: Response returns msg: "Get operation failed, looks like place_id  doesn't exists"

Test Case Description: place_id with leading whitespace
Expected Behavior: Server does not trim whitespace - returns not found error message

Test Case Description: place_id with trailing whitespace
Expected Behavior: Server does not trim whitespace - returns not found error message

Test Case Description: Unicode characters for place_id
Expected Behavior: Response returns msg: "Get operation failed, looks like place_id  doesn't exists"

Test Case Description: XSS script tag in place_id
Expected Behavior: No script execution - server returns not found error message safely

Test Case Description: URL encoded SQL injection in place_id
Expected Behavior: Server decodes URL encoding safely - returns not found error message
